title: AgentInsightLine
description: One JSONL line appended by an agent to .design/intel/insights.jsonl at run-end.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the agent run completion.

agent.description: Agent name matching the frontmatter 'name' field (e.g. 'design-planner').

cycle.description: Active cycle ID from STATE.md (e.g. 'cycle-1'). Empty string if not in a cycle.

one_line_insight.description: One declarative sentence: what this agent produced or learned this run.

artifacts_written.description: Relative paths of files written during this run. Empty array for read-only agents.
